nasb.text: He gave them also the lands of the nations, That they might take possession of the fruit of the peoples’ labor,

esv.text: And he gave them the lands of the nations, and they took possession of the fruit of the peoples’ toil,

cnv.text: 他把多國的地土賜給他們， 他們就承受眾民勞碌的成果，

ccb.text: 祂把列国的土地赐给他们， 使他们获得别人的劳动成果。

csbs.text: 他把列国的地都赐给他们， 让他们继承了万民的劳苦所得，
